description: Migrate sync cursors from in-memory/local storage to Convex for all platforms (Slack, iMessage, Gmail, LinkedIn)

decisions.storage: Convex as single source of truth, no local cache
decisions.multi_device: Upserts handle races, no coordination needed

tasks.description: Add syncCursors table to Convex schema
steps: Add syncCursors table to packages/convex/convex/schema.ts
Fields: userId, platform (union), workspaceId (optional), cursorData (any), lastSyncAt
Add index by_user_platform on [userId, platform]
Add index by_user_platform_workspace on [userId, platform, workspaceId]
Run pnpm dev in convex to generate types

tasks.description: Create Convex functions for cursor CRUD
steps: Create packages/convex/convex/syncCursors.ts
Add getSyncCursor query (userId, platform, workspaceId?) -> cursor or null
Add upsertSyncCursor mutation (userId, platform, workspaceId?, cursorData, lastSyncAt)
Add deleteSyncCursor mutation for cleanup
Add listSyncCursors query for debugging (userId, platform?)

tasks.description: Migrate Slack sync to cloud cursors
steps: Update SlackSyncManager to fetch cursor from Convex on start
Replace in-memory conversationCursors with Convex reads
Update cursor in Convex after each batch sync
Store per-workspace cursor using team ID as workspaceId
Remove local cursor persistence code

tasks.description: Migrate iMessage sync to cloud cursors
steps: Update iMessage sync to fetch lastSyncAt from Convex
Store cursor per chat or global depending on current pattern
Update cursor after successful sync batch
Handle first-time sync (no cursor exists)

tasks.description: Migrate Gmail sync to cloud cursors
steps: Update Gmail sync to use historyId from Convex
Store per-account cursor using email/account ID as workspaceId
Update historyId after successful sync
Handle historyId expiration (full resync fallback)

tasks.description: Migrate LinkedIn sync to cloud cursors
steps: Update LinkedIn sync to fetch conversation cursor from Convex
Store cursor with platform='linkedin'
Update cursor after each sync batch
Remove any local file-based cursor storage
Remove in-memory cursor state from sync managers
Update reset/cleanup functions to clear Convex cursors
Add migration note for existing users (full resync on first run)
Add admin/debug endpoint to view user's sync cursors
Log cursor updates in sync managers for debugging
Consider adding to settings UI (optional)
Test: Two devices start sync simultaneously
Verify: Upserts dedupe messages correctly
Verify: Cursor eventually converges
Test: App reinstall resumes from cloud cursor

tasks.description: Add unit tests for cursor functions
steps: Test getSyncCursor returns null for new user
Test upsertSyncCursor creates and updates
Test cursor retrieval by platform and workspace
Test deleteSyncCursor cleanup
